query:
-- Requests per employee by shift
SELECT 
  e.shift,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS employees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS total_requests,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT e.id), 2) AS requests_per_employee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withdrawn,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 1) AS withdrawal_rate_pct
FROM employees e
JOIN requests r ON r.employee_id = e.id
WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation'
GROUP BY e.shift
ORDER BY e.shift;

FROM employees e

WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation'
